title: Oscanoltd Self adhesive Mini Caster, 4 Pieces, POM Body with Stainless Steel Ball, Adhesive Tape, White

"Enhance the functionality of your home or office with Oscanoltd Self-Adhesive Mini Casters. This 4-piece set features a durable POM body with stainless steel balls, ensuring smooth and easy movement for a variety of items. Whether you're adding mobility to storage boxes, small furniture, or kitchen appliances, these casters provide effortless glide and repositioning. No tools or drilling required – simply peel, stick, and enjoy the convenience of smooth, silent movement. Ideal for creating a more organized and efficient space!"
